content.subject: Offer for MEPF Design Consultancy Services for the proposed Hospital Project at {{location}}
content.introText: Please find attached along with our offer for rendering MEPF Design Consultancy Services for the proposed Hospital Project at {{location}}
content.submissionText: The submission includes the following annexures:

annexuresList.label: Scope of Services rendered under various disciplines.
Phases of Design and Time Schedule for Deliverables.

categories.title: ELECTRICAL SYSTEMS
categories.intro: Design and Calculation of following system....
items: Electrical load calculation
Substations / transformers, Panel Room, Meter Room
Backup systems like DG, UPS, Inverter, etc.
Panel & DB with SLD
Electrical and LV Shaft / Duct design
Bus duct, cable and cable tray routing
Solar Energy calculation and design
Earthing System
Lightning Arrester System
Point wiring, DB design
Lighting of common area

categories.title: EXTRA LOW VOLTAGE SYSTEMS
categories.intro: Design and Calculation of following system....
items: CCTV system / Security systems
Fire alarm system (FAS)
Public address system (PAS)
Access Control System (ACS)
Telephones (Only Passive Networking)
Data Networking (Only Passive Networking)
Rodent Repellent System
Gas Suppression System (For Server Room)
Very Early Smoke Detection System (VESDA (For Server Room)
Water Leak Detection System Telephone (For Server Room)

categories.title: HVAC (HEATING, VENTILATING AND AIR CONDITIONING)
categories.intro: Design and Calculation of following system....
items: Preparation of proper Heat load estimates of various floors with different zones/ areas.
Preparation of the H.V.A.C Scheme layout, drawings and details in co-ordination with Architectural & Structural Drawings.
Detailed layouts indicating Plant Rooms, detailed duct design, piping design and Air-distribution management.

categories.title: PUBLIC HEALTH ENGINEERING (PLUMBING)
items: Design calculation of water requirement for the buildings

subsections.title: Water supply system
items: Design calculation of total water requirement for the buildings
Design for domestic water plumbing set up Establish plumbing load and load analysis, water/utility stub outs and pipe sizes.
Locate and coordinate pipe sleeve requirements
Water supply and distribution plans and details
Pump sizing and location.

subsections.title: Drainage system
items: Sewage drainage of vertical shaft and diversion from ceiling and connecting to chamber
Roof, Podium, Ground and Basement Rain drain system
Waste water collection and transfer system

subsections.title: Water treatment plants (if any)
items: Calculation and Design of RO plant
Calculation and Design of STP plant
Calculation and Design of ETP plant

subsections.title: Rainwater harvesting
items: Design of rain water harvesting system in compliance with environment regulations

subsections.title: Heating systems
items: Design of hot water systems for rooms and other domestic consumption.

categories.title: FIRE PROTECTION
items: Fire detection system with Fire alarm panels, cabling and conduiting.
Designing Fire water requirements along with holding tanks and hydrant pumping systems.
Wet Risers, Fire hose reel and Automatic Sprinklers.
All Fire Protection systems design shall confirm to CFO's requirements.

categories.title: MEP REQUIREMENT IN MEDICAL AREA
categories.intro: We will MEP design in following area....
items: Cardiology
Cosmetology
ENT
General Surgery
Endocrinology
Gastroenterology
Trauma & Emergency care
Pediatrics
Nephrology
Neurology
Obstetrics & Gynecology
Ophthalmology
Orthopedix
Plastic surgery
Surgical Oncology
Dialysis
Urology
Bariatric surgery

categories.title: MOEF Document and Drawing (NA)
items: Design of MEP system in compliance with Environment regulations, and we will coordinate with EC consultants for all MEP requirements of MOEF.

subsections.title: Electrical Systems
items: Full project Electrical load calculations.
Energy saving calculation and Solar system calculation.
Transformer, DG, Panel Room, location Drawing.

subsections.title: Plumbing Systems
items: Calculation of Water requirement / STP for the Project.
Calculation of Storm Drain and Rain water harvesting system.
UG Tank, STP location Drawing.
Sewage, Storm Drainage, Rain water harvesting Drawing.

subsections.title: OWC Systems
items: Calculation and design of OWC requirement for the Project.

categories.title: HIGH RISE Document and Drawing (NA)
items: Design of MEP system in compliance with HIGH RISE regulations, and we will coordinate with HIGH RISE consultants for all MEP requirements.

categories.title: CRZ Document and Drawing (NA)
items: Design of MEP system in compliance with CRZ regulations, and we will coordinate with CRZ consultants for all MEP requirements.

content.title: PHASES OF DESIGN AND TIME SCHEDULE
content.intro:
Design and Engineering work will be carried out by
WISETECH MEP CONSULTANTS PVT LTD in the following stages:

phases.title: CONCEPT DESIGN
paragraphs: Based on the Client's brief and feedback WISETECH MEP CONSULTANTS PVT LTD shall prepare a Concept note indicating their understanding of the project and with drawings and notes on equipment and their space allocations.

Coordinate with Client and other Consultants on the project to arrive at a requisite proposal which shall be deemed to be the initial guidelines of the project for services under WISETECH MEP CONSULTANTS PVT LTD Design Scope.
deliverables: Space Planning Drawing    – 1 Set Hard Copy
All Calculation Sheet         – 1 Set Hard Copy
notes: Extra Hard Copy in Client Scope.
After Submission, Hard Copy of Revised Drawings and Documents in Client Scope.
phases.completionText:
This stage shall be considered complete from WISETECH MEP CONSULTANTS PVT LTD end on submission of the above documents

Time Schedule for submission of above deliverables – 45 days

phases.title: DESIGN DETAILING
paragraphs: On approval of Concept Stage, Design Detailing shall be carried out for utility areas and utility reticulation along with Plans, sections and Single line diagrams for various services.
deliverables: GFC All Drawing          – 3 Set Hard Copies
GFC SLD Drawing          – 3 Set Hard Copies
notes: Extra Hard Copy in Client Scope.
After Submission, Hard Copy of Revised Drawings and Documents in Client Scope.
phases.completionText:
This stage shall be considered complete from WISETECH MEP CONSULTANTS PVT LTD end on submission of the above Drawings and documents

Time Schedule for submission of above deliverables – 10 days

phases.title: TENDERING
introList: a) Generate documentation with technical and commercial specs.
deliverables: Bill of Quantities        – 1 Set Hard Copy
Drawings for tender       – 1 Set Hard Copy
notes: Extra Hard Copy in Client Scope.
After Submission, Hard Copy of Revised Drawings and Documents in Client Scope.
phases.completionText:
This stage shall be considered complete from WISETECH MEP CONSULTANTS PVT LTD end on submission of the above documents

Time Schedule for submission of above deliverables – 60 days

phases.title: CONTRACTING, PROCUREMENT, INSTALLATION AND COMMISSIONING
introList: a. Finalize modus operandi for issuing contracts
b. Documentation on tenderers with comparatives
c. Clarify technical issues with tenderers
d. Involve in tender negotiation with Client as and when requested by Client
e. Vetting and approving on As-built drawings from Vendors
f. Witness factory testing of equipment on instructions from Client
g. Initiate field design changes if any based on visits to the site
h. Approve installation, testing and commissioning report from Vendors
deliverables: Approval of GFC / Shop drawings    – 3 Set Hard copies by Vendor
Approval of technical documentation  – 3 Set Hard copies by Vendor
Approval of As-built drawings      – 3 Set Hard copies by Vendor

content.title: REMUNERATION & SCHEDULE OF PAYMENT

tables.title: STAGE WISE BREAK UP OF FEE
rows: Advance (To be paid along with the Work Order)

notes: GST Tax shall be applicable on all the above payments which shall be additionally paid at the then prevailing rates.
All adjustments on the total fee in case of any increase or decrease in the total built-up area shall be reconciled after the Design Detailing Stage of the project.
Payment against a stage completion shall be paid to WISETECH MEP CONSULTANTS PVT LTD within 15 days of submission of the invoice for the stage completed.

items.title: Travel Expense Charges / Reimbursement:
paragraphs: Any site visits outside Mumbai/ Navi Mumbai on this project on the express instructions of the Client/Architect shall reimburse to WISETECH MEP CONSULTANTS PVT LTD.
Modes of transport for such outstation visits shall be by Air and by hired cars for surface transportation.
Client / Architect shall arrange for Lodging and Boarding or alternatively shall reimburse the expenses incurred.

items.title: Extra Hard Copies Charges:
paragraphs: Expenses incurred on extra copies of documentation or drawings other than those specified above, International calls, faxes or couriers shall also be reimbursable.

items.title: Extra Meeting Charges:
paragraphs: Additional charges shall be applicable per day of meeting / visit as meeting section.
Client / Architect shall be informed about such additional expenses from time to time and the same shall be billed separately.

content.title: GENERAL TERMS AND CONDITIONS
content.areaCalculation: All Designs as per this offer shall be carried for total Built up areas only.

projectDuration.title: Fee Valid
projectDuration.text: Total fee indicated is valid up to {{completionDate}}. This may be deferred depending on the built-up area considered for MEPF Design services. Any extension to this period wherein WISETECH MEP CONSULTANTS PVT LTD would have to continue providing services shall be compensated by the Client at a mutually accepted fee which shall be incremented based on the then prevailing rates for MEPF Consultancy services.

projectDuration.title: Revision Work
projectDuration.text: Any major changes requested for by the Client or by the Architect or other Consultants on behalf of the Client, after finalization and approvals by client, the changes may involve cost escalation. This escalation shall be communicated to the client and shall be discussed and mutually agreed upon before proceeding with any changes.

projectDuration.title: Revision in Cost due to Mivan framework or shuttering
projectDuration.text: We have considered Normal RCC Work of building for our Fee Cost Estimate, if in future Project design with Mivan framework or shuttering, our fee will revised.

content.title: Not including in our scope of work
content.intro: The following shall not be part of our scope of work:

categories.title: Liasoning Work
categories.subtitle: WISETECH MEP CONSULTANTS PVT LTD shall not liaison with any 3rd party or Government bodies for any approvals or sanctions which may be required during the course of this project.

subcategories.title: Electrical
items: Electrical load sanction. (Scope of Electrical Liasoning Vendor)
Internal design of Substation (Electrical Supply Company / Liasoning)
Electrical work Inspector / PWD Approval (Scope of Electrical Vendor)

subcategories.title: Plumbing.
items: Plumbing Work NOC from Govt. Department (Scope of Plumbing Liasoning Vendor)

subcategories.title: Fire Fighting
items: Obtain CFO NOC (Scope of Fire Vendor)

subcategories.title: M&E
items: Obtain M&N NOC (Scope of Liasoning Team)
Designs for decorative / plumbing sanitary fixtures (Scope of Architect)
Designs for lighting fixtures (Scope of Architect)
Special Lighting Design (Scope of Lighting Consultants)
IT / AV Design (Scope of IT / AV Consultants)
Kitchen Design (Scope of Kitchen Consultants)
Room Automation (Scope of Automation Vendor)

categories.title: Work related PMC Team or Site Team:

items: Day-to-day site co-ordination.
Day to Day material inspection.
Day to Day vendor coordination.
Day to Day coordination with Client Purchase Team.
Qty. Measurement of Site work.
MEP Bill Audit / Approval as per Site.
MEP Documents and Drawings for MOEF.

categories.title: Extra Hard Copy of Drawing and Document

items: We will give Hard copy as per Annexure III and extra Hard Copy in Client Scope. Also, after revision also in Client Scope.
Concept Drawing         (By Wisetech)
GFC Drawing             (By Wisetech)
Shop drawings           (By Vendor)
As-built drawings       (By Vendor)

content.title: Meeting Schedule
content.intro: Please find below the on-site meeting schedule for the project.

rows: Service Initialization & Requirement / Concept Design / Design Detailing / Tendering
As per requirement at the Architect / Client Mumbai office

tables.intro:
The client is requested to give 1-week advance intimation for meetings with the Principal Consultant.

Any site meetings/visits beyond the number mentioned above will be charged additionally on a per-day basis, as noted below.

items.title: Terminate of services / Stop the Work.
paragraphs: 1. In the event that the Architect of Works / Client decides to terminate the services of WISETECH MEP CONSULTANTS PVT LTD for any reason whatsoever the same shall be informed by a written notice one month prior to termination and all dues for works submitted up to the date of termination shall be cleared.

2. In the event that WISETECH MEP CONSULTANTS PVT LTD wishes to stop providing Design Consultancy services to the Architect of Works / Client for any reason whatsoever, the same shall be informed to the latter through a written notice and all dues for works submitted up to the date of termination shall be cleared.

items.title: Payment Terms
paragraphs: 1. In the event that the project gets put on hold or infinitely delayed for reasons not attributable to WISETECH MEP CONSULTANTS PVT LTD, the Client shall pay off the fees up till the phase completed.
2. In the event of the project getting completed before the stipulated period the balance fee shall be settled completely against a single invoice.

closing.validity: This offer shall be valid for a period of 30 days from the date submitted. We now look forward to a favorable response from your end.
closing.signoff:
Yours Sincerely,

For WISETECH MEP CONSULTANTS PVT LTD.


Mohd. Mubeen
